name: Chocolate Cheesecake Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. 1 cup Vanilla Yogurt
2. 1 package (4 servings) chocolate instant pudding mix
3. 1½ cups cold lowfat or skim milk
Pour the milk and pudding mix into a bowl. Beat until well blended, 1-2 minutes using a mixer to mix well. Mix in the yogurt until blended. Spoon into dessert dishes if desired. Can garnish with chocolate sprinkles or coconut.
175 calories per serving if regular pudding is used or 110 calories if sugar-free pudding is used.
I always enjoyed this dessert whenever my mother would serve it.
